# Risk Register

## Purpose
This document tracks key delivery, operational, dependency, security, data, and control risks relevant to the initiative or platform.

## Guidance for completion
Record only meaningful risks that require monitoring or mitigation. Status should be updated as the risk posture changes. Linked Docs should point to any relevant architecture, control, cutover, or issue documentation.

| Risk ID | Risk Description | Category | Impact | Likelihood | Owner | Mitigation | Status | Linked Docs |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| <R-001> |  | Operational / Delivery / Security / Data / Dependency / Compliance | High / Medium / Low | High / Medium / Low |  |  | Open / Mitigated / Closed |  |
